commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0f58e2c7e73285b165b6b9f5ce685c94ea8af925)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes diagnostic memory pressure logging to add human-readable byte units, threshold percentage, an operator hint, and WARN-level emission for warning pressure, with a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +51, Tests +47. Total +98 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows warning-level memory pressure uses raw byte fields and log.info, while the linked issue supplies observed release logs with the same mismatch; I did not run a live long-running gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof and a small wording change; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's real gateway setup.

target.title: fix(logging): make memory pressure logs operator-actionable with units, percentage, and hint
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #90783.

The `gateway/diagnostics/memory` subsystem emitted `memory pressure:` messages with raw byte counts, no percentage of the threshold, and no operator guidance. Additionally, `level=warning` pressure was logged at pino `INFO` level, making it invisible to default `WARN+` log filters.

Changes in `src/logging/diagnostic-memory.ts`:
- Adds human-readable byte fields (`rss`, `heapUsed`, `threshold`, `rssGrowth`) using binary units (`B/KiB/MiB/GiB/TiB`).
- Adds `percentOfThreshold` so operators can see how far above the threshold the gateway is.
- Appends a single `hint=\"...\"` pointing operators toward `openclaw gateway restart` and reviewing long-lived caches (dreaming, transcripts).
- Emits both `warning` and `critical` pressure through `log.warn()` so the actual pino level matches the payload.

Throttling and critical-bundle behavior are unchanged. Raw byte fields are retained so existing machine parsing keeps working.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/logging/diagnostic-memory.test.ts --run` passes (11/11).
- `pnpm lint:all src/logging/diagnostic-memory.ts src/logging/diagnostic-memory.test.ts` passes.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/logging/diagnostic-memory.ts src/logging/diagnostic-memory.test.ts` applied.

Real behavior proof (local):
```text
$ pnpm test src/logging/diagnostic-memory.test.ts --run
...logs warning pressure at WARN level with human-readable units and an operator hint
```
The new assertion confirms the emitted log record has `level: \"WARN\"`, `rssBytes=2012905472 rss=1.87 GiB`, `thresholdBytes=1610612736 threshold=1.50 GiB`, `percentOfThreshold=125%`, and the operator hint.

## Behavior addressed

Memory pressure warning logs are now human-readable and include a recommended next step, and the pino log level matches the `level` payload.
target.author: xydigit-sj
